design_philosophy.core_loop: Side-scrolling positioning and timing-based punch execution against procedurally-varied opponents across a championship season
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Precision timing window for unleashing a one-hit KO 'Final Blow' versus safe but less rewarding standard punches
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Rising boxer climbing through a championship tournament, culminating in victory; licensing Buster Douglas creates narrative fantasy of defeating Mike Tyson (Nintendo's exclusive)
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Commitment to arcade simplicity (left/right movement, single powerful attack) over simulation depth; rejection of complex boxing mechanics in favor of pattern recognition and timing mastery

difficulty.checkpointing: Tournament bracket progression with multiple rounds against different opponents
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Spectator mode available for learning opponent patterns without risk

progression.unlock_mechanism: Advancement through fixed tournament bracket: five fictional fighters in sequence (Dynamite Joe, Fernando Gomez, Kim Nang, King Jason, The Invincible Black Panther) plus Genesis-exclusive boxers (Buster Douglas, Ironhead)
replayability_hooks: Multiple playable boxers with distinct patterns
Spectator mode for observing alternate matchups
Pattern mastery required for one-hit KO timing

world_building_techniques: Boxer epithets/nicknames establish personality (e.g., 'The Miracle Fighter', 'The Korean Comet')
Real-world licensing (Buster Douglas post-Tyson upset) grounds fantasy in contemporary sports culture
Championship tournament structure implies narrative progression

boss_design.philosophy: Escalating opponent patterns within arcade boxing framework; each opponent represents distinct fighting style conveyed through epithet and behavior
notable_bosses: Fernando Gomez - The South American Eagle
The Detroit Kid / The Invincible Black Panther

faction_indicators: Nationality/regional identity via boxer epithets (South American, Korean, Detroit, implicit American)
danger_signals: Arcade pattern-memorization structure could reinforce 'unbeatable' opponent archetypes through fixed movesets
environmental_storytelling: Championship bracket visual design communicates tournament hierarchy
